items.title: Ogugua Anunoby currently has a .784 TS% in the NBA Finals, which would be the highest TS% in a single Finals by a starter of All-Time, breaking Klay Thompson's .706 in 2016
items.author: IdeaGlad1134
items.body_excerpt: OG Anunoby currently has a .784 TS% in the NBA Finals, which would be the highest TS% in a single Finals by a starter of All-Time 58% from the field and 56% from 3 The decision for Finals MVP is looking quite difficult for the judges - Brunson carries the much higher usage rate…
